The Seasons

Every front page this site has ever had, kept whole.

The homepage of this site is composed fresh each season around what the studio is doing, then retired here — unchanged, at a permanent address — when the season turns. Twelve so far.

Now live

XII — The Memory of Atmosphere

Spring 2026 · the weather paintings, the night press runs, and the re-photography of the early archive
Season XI

The Meaning of Time

lived Dec 2025 — Mar 2026
A winter spent inside one installation — its construction, its light, its dismantling.
Season X

Twelve Plates

lived Sep — Dec 2025
A full press cycle, documented plate by plate as the editions came off.
Season IX

Above the Clouds

lived Jun — Sep 2025
The first weather paintings, and a monsoon that wouldn't arrive.
Season VIII

Once Creatures Existed

lived Mar — Jun 2025
A season with the megafauna — rhinos, whales, and the ones already gone.
Season VII

Cyclum Lunarem

lived Dec 2024 — Mar 2025
Gold leaf, moon cycles, and the small panels painted in threes and fours.
Season VI

The Early Panels

lived Sep — Dec 2024
A look backward: the 2012–2014 panel paintings, rephotographed and recatalogued.
